code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut have = false
mut best = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      if n > 0
        if not have
          best = n
          have = true
        else if n > best
          best = n
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if have
  println("max=#{best}")
else
  println("none")
end
